pages.bodyTextSample: L Lance CLOSE PREVIEW DOWNLOAD PDF CLIENT INVOICE SUMMARY Invoice INV-2026-4078 from bkb kumar AMOUNT DUE ₹10,288 AGREEMENT Terms review required Review and accept the agreement to unlock the invoice for payment. PAYMENT Payment locked Net 44 · Due 02 Jul 2026. Payment details unlock after terms are accepted. CLIENT ACTION Review terms first Accept terms or request changes before payment. bkb kumar D207 , Tower D2, 2nd floor , Godrej e city, BANGALORE, Karnataka, 560100 Karnataka INVOICE NUMBER INV-2026-4078 DATE 19 May 2026 DUE 02 Jul 2026 BILLED TO LazyPanda 207 , Tower D2, 2nd floor , Godrej e city, BANGALORE, Karnataka Karnataka GSTIN 665775774848475 PAYMENT TERMS Net 44 Days DESCRIPTION QTY RATE AMOUNT Office space planning and design Architecture & Interior Design HSN/SAC: pending Unit: per-sqft 163 ₹44 ₹7,172 Material selection and specification schedule Architecture & Interior Design HSN/SAC: pending Unit: per-room 38 ₹82 ₹3,116 Subtotal ₹10,288 Tax (0%) ₹0 TOTAL DUE ₹10,288 Rupees Ten Thousand Two Hundred Eighty Eight Only BANK DETAILS HDFC Account: 553553555356636 IFSC: HF NOTES 1.5% monthly late fee applies. Final files delivered after full payment. AUTHORIZED SIGNATORY bkb kumar DIGITAL SIGNATURE This is a computer-generated document and does not require a physical signature. We declare that this invoice shows the actual price of the services described and that all particulars are true and correct. GENERATED BY LANCEINVOICE Invoice #INV-2026-4078 • Shared via Lance × Action Required: Review Terms Invoice #INV-2026-4078 from bkb kumar STEP 1 Review agreement STEP 2 Net 44 STEP 3 Accept or request changes MASTER SERVICE AGREEMENT Master Service Agreement MASTER SERVICE AGREEMENT This Master Service Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between the service provider ("Agency") and the client ("Client") as referenced in the associated invoice. 1. SCOPE OF WORK The Agency will provide services as described in each invoice or statement of work ("SOW") issued under this Agreement. Each SOW will detail the specific deliverables, timelines, and associated fees. 2. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY RIGHTS All intellectual property created during the engagement, including but not limited to designs, code, copy, and media assets, shall remain the property of the Agency until full payment has been received. Upon complete payment, ownership of the final deliverables transfers to the Client. Work-in-progress files, source files, and intermediate assets remain the property of the Agency unless explicitly included in the deliverables. 3. PAYMENT TERMS - Payment is due as specified in each invoice. - Late payments will incur a fee of 1.5% per month (18% per annum) on the outstanding balance. - The Agency reserves the right to suspend work if payment is overdue by more than 15 days. 4. REVISIONS & SCOPE CHANGES - Each SOW includes up to 2 rounds of revisions unless otherwise specified. - Additional revisions or scope changes will be billed at the Agency's standard hourly rate. - Major scope changes require a revised SOW and mutual agreement. 5. LIABILITY - The Agency's total liability under this Agreement shall not exceed the total fees paid by the Client for the specific SOW in question. - The Agency is not liable for indirect, consequential, or incidental damages arising from the use of deliverables. 6. CONFIDENTIALITY Both parties agree to maintain confidentiality of proprietary information shared during the engagement. This obligation survives termination of this Agreement. 7. TERMINATION - Either party may terminate this Agreement with 15 days' written notice. - Upon termination, the Client shall pay for all work completed up to the termination date. - Cancellation after work has commenced will incur a cancellation fee of 25% of the remaining project value. 8. GOVERNING LAW This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India. Any disputes arising shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the courts in the Agency's registered city. 9. ACCEPTANCE By accepting this Agreement (electronically or otherwise), the Client acknowledges that they have read, understood, and agree to be bound by the terms outlined above. ! Project-Specific Addendum These specific terms override the Master Agreement for this invoice only. Payment Terms: Net 44 Additional Notes: 1.5% monthly late fee applies. Final files delivered after full payment. PREVIEW MODE This is what your client sees when they open the link from their email. You cannot accept on their behalf. CLOSE PREVIEW

GENERATED BY LANCEINVOICE Invoice #INV-2026-4078 • Shared via Lance × Action Required: Review Terms Invoice #INV-2026-4078 from bkb kumar STEP 1 Review agreement STEP 2 Net 44 STEP 3 Accept or request changes MASTER SERVICE AGREEMENT Master Service Agreement MASTER SERVICE AGREEMENT This Master Service Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between the service provider ("Agency") and the client ("Client") as referenced in the associated invoice.
SCOPE OF WORK The Agency will provide services as described in each invoice or statement of work ("SOW") issued under this Agreement.
Each SOW will detail the specific deliverables, timelines, and associated fees.

INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY RIGHTS All intellectual property created during the engagement, including but not limited to designs, code, copy, and media assets, shall remain the property of the Agency until full payment has been received.
Upon complete payment, ownership of the final deliverables transfers to the Client.
Work-in-progress files, source files, and intermediate assets remain the property of the Agency unless explicitly included in the deliverables.
PAYMENT TERMS - Payment is due as specified in each invoice.
- Late payments will incur a fee of 1.5% per month (18% per annum) on the outstanding balance.
- The Agency reserves the right to suspend work if payment is overdue by more than 15 days.
REVISIONS & SCOPE CHANGES - Each SOW includes up to 2 rounds of revisions unless otherwise specified.
- Additional revisions or scope changes will be billed at the Agency's standard hourly rate.
- Major scope changes require a revised SOW and mutual agreement.
LIABILITY - The Agency's total liability under this Agreement shall not exceed the total fees paid by the Client for the specific SOW in question.
- The Agency is not liable for indirect, consequential, or incidental damages arising from the use of deliverables.
CONFIDENTIALITY Both parties agree to maintain confidentiality of proprietary information shared during the engagement.
This obligation survives termination of this Agreement.
TERMINATION - Either party may terminate this Agreement with 15 days' written notice.
- Upon termination, the Client shall pay for all work completed up to the termination date.
- Cancellation after work has commenced will incur a cancellation fee of 25% of the remaining project value.
GOVERNING LAW This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India.
Any disputes arising shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the courts in the Agency's registered city.
ACCEPTANCE By accepting this Agreement (electronically or otherwise), the Client acknowledges that they have read, understood, and agree to be bound by the terms outlined above.

GENERATED BY LANCEINVOICE Invoice #INV-2026-4078 • Shared via Lance × Action Required: Review Terms Invoice #INV-2026-4078 from bkb kumar STEP 1 Review agreement STEP 2 Net 44 STEP 3 Accept or request changes MASTER SERVICE AGREEMENT Master Service Agreement MASTER SERVICE AGREEMENT This Master Service Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between the service provider ("Agency") and the client ("Client") as referenced in the associated invoice.
SCOPE OF WORK The Agency will provide services as described in each invoice or statement of work ("SOW") issued under this Agreement.
Each SOW will detail the specific deliverables, timelines, and associated fees.

INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY RIGHTS All intellectual property created during the engagement, including but not limited to designs, code, copy, and media assets, shall remain the property of the Agency until full payment has been received.
Upon complete payment, ownership of the final deliverables transfers to the Client.
Work-in-progress files, source files, and intermediate assets remain the property of the Agency unless explicitly included in the deliverables.
PAYMENT TERMS - Payment is due as specified in each invoice.
- Late payments will incur a fee of 1.5% per month (18% per annum) on the outstanding balance.
- The Agency reserves the right to suspend work if payment is overdue by more than 15 days.
REVISIONS & SCOPE CHANGES - Each SOW includes up to 2 rounds of revisions unless otherwise specified.
- Additional revisions or scope changes will be billed at the Agency's standard hourly rate.
- Major scope changes require a revised SOW and mutual agreement.
LIABILITY - The Agency's total liability under this Agreement shall not exceed the total fees paid by the Client for the specific SOW in question.
- The Agency is not liable for indirect, consequential, or incidental damages arising from the use of deliverables.
CONFIDENTIALITY Both parties agree to maintain confidentiality of proprietary information shared during the engagement.
This obligation survives termination of this Agreement.
TERMINATION - Either party may terminate this Agreement with 15 days' written notice.
- Upon termination, the Client shall pay for all work completed up to the termination date.
- Cancellation after work has commenced will incur a cancellation fee of 25% of the remaining project value.
GOVERNING LAW This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India.
Any disputes arising shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the courts in the Agency's registered city.
ACCEPTANCE By accepting this Agreement (electronically or otherwise), the Client acknowledges that they have read, understood, and agree to be bound by the terms outlined above.
! Project-Specific Addendum These specific terms override the Master Agreement for this invoice only.
Payment Terms: Net 44 Additional Notes: 1.5% monthly late fee applies.
PREVIEW MODE This is what your client sees when they open the link from their email.
You cannot accept on their behalf.
CLOSE PREVIEW

modals.bodyTextSample: L LANCE DASHBOARD PROJECTS INVOICES CLIENTS FAQ + NEW INVOICE 9+ DRAFT INV-2026-1230 ⎘ − 70% + bkb kumar D207 , Tower D2, 2nd floor , Godrej e city, BANGALORE, Karnataka, 560100 Karnataka INVOICE NUMBER INV-2026-1230 DATE 24 May 2026 DUE 13 Jun 2026 BILLED TO ruhnika r207 , Tower D2, 2nd floor , Godrej e city, BANGALORE, Karnataka Karnataka GSTIN 665775774848478 PAYMENT TERMS Net 20 Days DESCRIPTION QTY RATE AMOUNT MILESTONE Discovery Phase SUBTOTAL ₹4,36,510 MEP coordination drawings Architecture & Interior Design HSN/SAC: pending Unit: per-sqft 163 ₹84 ₹13,692 Pool and water feature design Architecture & Interior Design HSN/SAC: pending Unit: per-sqft 38 ₹11,000 ₹4,18,000 Infographic design with data visualisation Graphic Design HSN/SAC: 998391 Unit: Per hour 73 ₹66 ₹4,818 MILESTONE Prototyping SUBTOTAL ₹728 Explainer video editing + voice-over sync Video Editing HSN/SAC: 999613 Unit: Per hour 52 ₹14 ₹728 MILESTONE Pre-Prod SUBTOTAL ₹4,292 YouTube video editing with motion assets Animation/Video HSN/SAC: 998313 Unit: Per day 58 ₹74 ₹4,292 MILESTONE Delivery SUBTOTAL ₹12,826 final delivery file handling Branding & Identity HSN/SAC: 998391 Unit: Per deliverable 121 ₹106 ₹12,826 MILESTONE BILLING MILESTONE 1 OF 4 Due now (Milestone 1) ₹4,36,510 Remaining milestones ₹17,846 Total project ₹4,54,356 Note: Please transfer the relevant Milestone Subtotal as outlined above. Subtotal ₹4,54,356 Tax (0%) ₹0 TOTAL DUE ₹4,54,356 Rupees Four Lakh Fifty Four Thousand Three Hundred Fifty Six Only BANK DETAILS HDFC Account: 553553555356636 IFSC: HF NOTES 1.5% monthly late fee applies. Final files delivered after full payment. AUTHORIZED SIGNATORY bkb kumar DIGITAL SIGNATURE This is a computer-generated document and does not require a physical signature. We declare that this invoice shows the actual price of the services described and that all particulars are true and correct.
